title: Tracker updated to ECDC 14 May status split
summary: Current count remains 11 total MV Hondius-linked cases and 3 deaths. Status split updated to 8 confirmed, 2 probable, 1 inconclusive, and 0 suspected cases based on the ECDC 14 May 2026 update.

title: WHO reports 11 cases and 3 deaths
summary: WHO reported 11 cases among passengers or crew, including 9 confirmed Andes virus infections, 2 probable cases, and 3 deaths.

title: WHO identifies Andes virus in confirmed cases
summary: WHO reported eight total cases, including six confirmed and two probable cases, with confirmed cases identified as Andes virus.
